title: Paigham
writer: T. Mukherjee, Ramanand Sagar, Kothamangalam Subbu
plot: Widowed Mrs. Lal lives with her two sons, Ram and Ratan; an unmarried daughter, Sheela; Ram's wife, Parvati and her children. While Ram is employed in a mill, Ratan is studying engineering in Calcutta. When Ratan returns, he is of...
